mood: Clean, trustworthy, mainstream storage template — the safe-default look that lets the atomic-blocks system shine without competing for attention
designRules: IDENTITY: Manrope headings at confident scale (4xl-6xl). Deep navy primary, warm amber accent reserved for CTAs and price callouts. Warm off-white ground (#F7F8FA) — no pure white sections.

ATOMIC BLOCKS: This template renders Payload pages composed entirely of atomic blocks (hero, features-grid, rental-steps, storage-resources, testimonial, blog-archive, search-callout, etc.). Visual design lives in the template; structure lives in Payload; AI tweaks per-block styling via direct file edits.

LAYOUT: Vertical stack of full-bleed sections with consistent padding (py-20 px-6 sm:px-10 lg:px-16). Inner content max-width 7xl. Section backgrounds alternate background → surface → background for visual rhythm.
CONVERSION: Sticky nav with amber Reserve CTA. Search callout on every home page. Hero CTAs always visible above fold. Each unit/feature card has a clear primary action.

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-surface rounded-xl p-6 border border-text/10 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all">
designPatterns.button: <a className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-accent text-text font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-md text-base shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-surface text-primary font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-md text-base border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-surface transition-all">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold text-text tracking-tight" style="text-wrap: balance">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-accent/10 text-accent rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full bg-surface border border-text/15 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/25 focus:border-primary transition" />
designPatterns.navStyle: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-text/10 shadow-sm
designPatterns.navButton: <a className="inline-flex items-center bg-accent text-text font-bold px-5 py-2.5 rounded-md text-sm hover:opacity-90 transition">
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="h-12 w-12 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
